title: GORGE TRANSLINK - 211info
text: GORGE TRANSLINK GORGE TRANSLINK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An alliance of rural providers offering public transportation services throughout the Mid-Columbia River Gorge area and to more distant destinations, such as Portland, Oregon, and Vancouver, Washington. 802 Chenowith Loop Road The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-4202 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-4202 Hood River County's Columbia Area Transit Main phone (541) 296-7595 Wasco County's The Link Public Transit Main phone (541) 565-3553 Sherman County Community Transit Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to find transportation options or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties Services: Local Bus Services Long Distance Transportation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GORGE TRANSLINK
